source.business_scenario: customer.active 通过 rental 计数自更新
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
UPDATE customer c
SET active = (
  SELECT COUNT(*) > 0
  FROM rental r
  WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id
)
